title: Nursery Rhyme. CCXCIX. Games.
content:
Ride a cock-horse to Banbury-cross,
            To see what Tommy can buy;
        A penny white loaf, a penny white cake,
            And a twopenny apple-pie.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Unknown delivers a powerful performance in "Nursery Rhyme. CCXCIX. Games."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
